message.content:
@startuml
actor user
participant "FindWorkbookUI" as FindWorkbookUI #D3D3D3 
participant "UIController" as UIController #D3D3D3  
participant "FindWorkbooksController\n" as FindWorkbooksController  #D3D3D3   
participant StartWorkbooksSearch   #D3D3D3    
participant fw : FindWorkbooks    #D3D3D3     
participant Paths     #D3D3D3      
participant Files      #D3D3D3       
participant Cleansheets       #D3D3D3        
autonumber "<b>[0]" 

== ==

user ->> FindWorkbookUI:startWorkooksSearch()


activate FindWorkbookUI 


create participant FW1 <<controller>>\n<<threaded>> {
}



FW2 <- -[hidden]#red;note right of FW2:this create() call represents \nthe creation of a new thread \nof this same class




loop [todas as paths]
	FW1->>+StartWorkbooksSearch:create(path, WorkbooksFoundList)	
	alt
	
	end alt
		
end loop	


deactivate FindWorkbookUI 



@enduml
